name: Young-Mi | Maternity leave
description:
“So you want to make me a mommy, is that right~? Guess that means I should file for maternity leave then..”

Who else lonely for Valentines?

I hope you guys enjoy this bot, I know it’s not much tokens but it’s fairly simple so I couldn’t add much to it lol

Anyways a lot of people in my server were thirsting over her when I showed her to everyone, and one of my moderators even bribed the votes by giving out a free nitro premium..so..err..here you go!

My next bots will either be more gooner material..OR it’ll show off my writing skills..heheh..

Okay I hope you guys love the bot! I love you all and I’ll see you on the next bot! Bye bye! 🤍🩵🤍

No extra pics since it’s an oc sorry 😅
creator: Capt
